chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – The righteousness with the parents

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/398)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/398)
text: يَأْتِي يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِثْلُ الْكُبَّةِ فَيَدْفَعُ فِي ظَهْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَيُدْخِلُهُ الْجَنَّةَ فَيُقَالُ هَذَا الْبِرُّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Sayf,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There would come, on the Day of Judgement, something like a globe, so it would push in the back of the Believer and enter him into the Paradise, and it would be said: ‘This is the righteousness’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Sayf from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “On the Day of Judgment something will suddenly come behind the believer, rush him forward and admit him in paradise. It will be said, ‘This is kindness.’”
